sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, name String, age Int32, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'john doe', 30, now()), (2, NULL, 25, now()), (3, 'jane o''conner', 28, NULL);
SELECT id, initcap(name) AS formatted_name FROM test_strings WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, initcap(name) AS formatted_name FROM test_strings WHERE age - 10 > 20;
SELECT id, initcap(name) AS formatted_name FROM test_strings WHERE initcap(name) - age < 100;
SELECT id, initcap(name) AS formatted_name FROM (SELECT id, name, age FROM test_strings WHERE age IS NOT NULL) AS s WHERE age - 5 < 30;
SELECT initcap(name) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT name FROM test_strings WHERE created_at IS NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN age IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' ELSE initcap(name) END AS name_or_unknown FROM test_strings;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE age - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings) IN (0, 1);
SELECT id, initcap(name) AS formatted_name FROM test_strings GROUP BY initcap(name) HAVING COUNT(id) > 1;
SELECT id, initcap(name) AS formatted_name FROM test_strings ORDER BY initcap(name) DESC;
SELECT id, initcap(name) AS formatted_name FROM test_strings WHERE name LIKE '%conner' AND age - 5 BETWEEN 0 AND 30;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS name_count FROM test_strings GROUP BY initcap(name) HAVING name_count >= 1;
CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date Date, description String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, '2023-01-01', 'New Year''s Day'), (2, '2023-02-14', NULL), (3, NULL, 'Valentine''s Day');
SELECT id, initcap(description) AS formatted_description FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) - COUNT(event_date) AS null_dates FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_date, initcap(description) AS formatted_desc FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates) > 2 HAVING formatted_desc IS NOT NULL;
SELECT initcap(description) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NULL AND id - 1 = 0;
SELECT DISTINCT initcap(description) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > '2023-01-01' AND event_date < now();
